narrative.description: Activision's isometric space shooter tasks players with clearing twelve sectors of an orbital defense grid, flying above a force-beam surface while destroying alien factories and drones from a pseudo-3D perspective.
narrative.core_loop: Pilot above the beam grid, destroy sector targets and factories, then defeat the sector sentinel to unlock the next orbital zone.

mechanics.map_notes: Isometric scrolling creates a faux-3D lane over the force-beam surface.
mechanics.expression: Isometric scrolling creates a faux-3D lane over the force-beam surface.

mechanics.map_notes: Twelve numbered sectors each require destroying a quota of targets before the sentinel appears.
mechanics.expression: Twelve numbered sectors each require destroying a quota of targets before the sentinel appears.

mechanics.map_notes: Altitude shifts along the beam plane change which enemies and obstacles are hittable.
mechanics.expression: Altitude shifts along the beam plane change which enemies and obstacles are hittable.

mechanics.map_notes: Laser fires on button press with no charge time.
mechanics.expression: Laser fires on button press with no charge time.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship shields deplete on contact and enemy hits.
mechanics.expression: Ship shields deplete on contact and enemy hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Three ships per credit with continue on game over.
mechanics.expression: Three ships per credit with continue on game over.

mechanics.map_notes: Drones emit diagonal bullet streams across the isometric grid.
mechanics.expression: Drones emit diagonal bullet streams across the isometric grid.

mechanics.map_notes: Sector sentinels follow fixed movement and firing loops.
mechanics.expression: Sector sentinels follow fixed movement and firing loops.

mechanics.map_notes: Sentinel charge attacks telegraph with a brief glow before impact.
mechanics.expression: Sentinel charge attacks telegraph with a brief glow before impact.

mechanics.map_notes: Beam edges and factory structures constrain movement lanes.
mechanics.expression: Beam edges and factory structures constrain movement lanes.

mechanics.map_notes: Final sector sentinel requires multiple destruction phases.
mechanics.expression: Final sector sentinel requires multiple destruction phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Sector select resumes progress after clearing each zone.
mechanics.expression: Sector select resumes progress after clearing each zone.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Beamrider through its core shooter loop.
